englishDefinitions: A crude, humorous, or insulting way of referring to a boyfriend who drinks a lot of beer.
Used informally to say that someone misses their boyfriend, with a joking or rude tone.
persianTranslation: دلم برای اون دوست‌پسرِ آبجوبازم تنگ شده
دلم برای اون پسرِ آبجویی‌ام تنگ شده
examples: She joked that she missed her keg-sucking boyfriend when he was out of town.
That phrase is rude and humorous, so use it only with close friends.
I miss my keg-sucking boyfriend, but he’s traveling for work.
